# Majesticons

- **Source**: https://github.com/halfmage/majesticons
- **Site**: https://majesticons.com
- **Author**: Gerrit Halfmann
- **License**: MIT (see `LICENSE`)
- **Version fetched**: depth-1 clone, 2026-04-21
- **Icon count**: 760 SVGs (380 concepts x 2 styles: line + solid)
- **Style**: 24x24 grid, outline and solid pair per concept
- **Raw SVG path**: `line/` and `solid/`

## Contents

- `line/` — 380 outline variants (filename suffix `-line.svg`)
- `solid/` — 380 filled variants (filename suffix `-solid.svg`)
- `LICENSE` — MIT
- `README.md` — upstream readme

## Consolidate notes

- Line/solid parity is the reason to use this set. Same concept, same footprint, two states.
- Built with optimized strokes via SVGO. Cleaner XML than most sets.
- Same author as Pixelarticons (halfmage) — design grammars are compatible if you're pairing retro + modern UI layers.
